banner: DECISION-SUPPORT PROTOTYPE — NOT A MEDICAL DEVICE. Synthetic data only. High-acuity dispositions require human-clinician approval before any action.

disposition.action: Direct to Emergency Department now; activate the on-call clinician.
disposition.summary: ESI 2 → ED_NOW. Red flags: ACS_CHEST_PAIN. Direct to Emergency Department now; activate the on-call clinician. Differential: Acute coronary syndrome / myocardial infarction (most likely; classic crushing substernal pain radiating to left arm with diaphoresis and dyspnea), Unstable angina, Aortic dissection, Pulmonary embolism.
